ddls:
CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_title" TEXT /* Title or subject of the topic */,
  "topic_starter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the topic */,
  "posts_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts under the topic */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Total views for the topic */,
  "last_action" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last action on the topic */,
  "last_post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last post made in the topic */,
  "locked" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the topic is locked (no new posts allowed) */,
  "sticky" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the topic is sticky (pinned to the top of the list) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the topic was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description or summary of the topic */,
  "views_by_members" INTEGER /* Tracks views by regular members */,
  "views_by_guests" INTEGER /* Tracks views by guests (non-registered users) */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the topic is private (visible only to specific users or groups) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_topic_starter_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_starter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the forum */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, member) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* User's biography or about section */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the user's personal website or blog */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON string containing links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "activity_score" INTEGER /* A score reflecting the user's activity level on the forum */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is banned from the forum */,
  "ban_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the user's ban */,
  "ban_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date for the user's ban */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic to which the post belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the post was made */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the post has been edited */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the post */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last edit */,
  "deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the post has been deleted */,
  "deleted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deleted the post */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the post deletion */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the post was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to make the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_deleted_by FOREIGN KEY ("deleted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post to which the comment belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been edited */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the comment */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last edit */,
  "deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been deleted */,
  "deleted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deleted the comment */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the comment deletion */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the comment was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to make the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_deleted_by FOREIGN KEY ("deleted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being liked (nullable) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being liked (nullable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the post or comment */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the like was made */,
  "is_positive" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the like is positive or negative (for upvotes/downvotes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic related to the notification */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post related to the notification */,
  "content" TEXT /* Notification content */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, moderator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or explanation of the tag */,
  "color" TEXT /* Hex color code for the tag to be displayed in the UI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topic_tags" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic (foreign key) */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag (foreign key) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (foreign key) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role (foreign key) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation log */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., edit, delete) */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target post or comment */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the action was automated or manual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the setting is currently enabled */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting and its purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
